response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior software developer with strong full-stack and craftsmanship credentials, but does not meet the hard requirements for this CTO role. There is no evidence of executive leadership, scaling teams from 10 to 30+, fintech infrastructure depth (credit risk, working capital, trade decisioning), or production multi-agent AI systems. Mentions of MCP and agentic workflows at re:cinq are recent and appear to be contributor-level rather than architectural ownership at scale.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering experience across backend, distributed systems, and high-throughput services (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Strong software craftsmanship discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tooling authorship
Some exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, plus prior fintech-adjacent work at RIDE Capital
concerns: No executive/CTO-level leadership experience; no track record scaling engineering orgs to 30+ or building a senior leadership layer
Lacks demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems, LLM evaluation pipelines, and agentic framework architecture at scale
No deep fintech infrastructure experience in credit risk, working-capital allocation, or regulated trade decisioning

key_factors.factor: Missing executive leadership and team scaling track record
No production multi-agent AI system ownership
